[type]
CompositeLexer

[grammar]
lexer grammar M;

@lexer::members {

def handleBeginArgument(self):
    if self.inLexerRule():
        self.pushMode(2)
        self.more()
    else:
        self.pushMode(1)

def handleEndArgument(self):
    self.popMode()
    assert(len(self._modeStack) == 0)

def inLexerRule(self):
    return True
}

import ANTLRv4Lexer;

[slaveGrammar]
lexer grammar S;
A : 'a' {<writeln("\"S.A\"")>};
C : 'c' ;

[input]
[\r\n]
[output]
[@0,0:5='[\r\n]',<5>,1:0]
[@1,6:6='\n',<12>,channel=2,1:6]
[@2,7:6='<EOF>',<-1>,2:0]
